description: Create a two-column content slide on European private equity market outlook with a horizontal bar chart of expected 2019 vs. 2018 PE M&A activity by country on the left and takeaway bullets on the right.

header.kicker: Development of the European private equity market
header.headline: Respondents differ more regarding their regional growth outlook – Positive outlooks for Spain/Portugal, Scandinavia and CEE
header.sub: Change in PE M&A activity in major countries – 2019 vs. 2018 [%]

left.title: "What change in PE M&A activities do you expect to see in the following countries in 2019?"

items.text: Stronger differentiation with regard to the regional growth outlook
Most favorable outlook for PE markets in Spain & Portugal, which may benefit from positive catch-up effect
Germany's outlook remains positive, albeit with less intensity than seen in past years
A slight decline is expected for France. Expectations have shifted sharply away from the positive sentiment around a more reform-oriented agenda in last year's survey
UK expected to see a decline in M&A activities in the context of ongoing difficult Brexit discussions
